widgets_values: ID_A is a 1 young woman in her twenties with shoulder-length dark brown hair, a slim build, and a soft natural look. ID_A wears a loose light beige knit top and relaxed dark trousers, creating a quiet home-lifestyle appearance. ID_A’s voice is a clear young female voice with a soft mid-high register, gentle breathiness, and intimate vlog-style pacing. The mouth movement is clearly visible in the frame and remains naturally synchronized with the spoken line, especially on slower reflective phrases and lightly smiled vowel shapes. At normal speed, ID_A steps into the center of the frame, settles the posture, and begins speaking with a calm and thoughtful expression. The lip movement aligns closely with the audio throughout the full sentence, especially on the slower emotional beats. In a soft young female voice with reflective warmth, ID_A says, \"I did not plan to record tonight, but something about this room felt different when I walked back in.\" The shot uses realistic indoor vlog-style imagery with soft practical light, neutral tones, and a warm personal atmosphere. The tone feels calm, introspective, and naturally domestic rather than performative. A stable medium shot frames ID_A from the waist up, keeping the face, upper-body posture, and visible lip movement clearly readable while preserving some of the room behind. The background includes a white curtain, soft string lights, part of a small table, and the warm interior of a well-kept room. The setting feels personal, lived-in, and quiet. Very soft indoor room tone, light fabric movement, and subtle foot placement are audible. No prominent background music. The audio focus remains on speech and subtle room ambience.",/n"ID_A is a young woman in her twenties with shoulder-length dark brown hair, soft natural makeup, and a gentle but observant expression. ID_A wears a loose light beige knit top and dark relaxed trousers. ID_A’s voice is a youthful female voice with clear diction, a soft intimate tone, and slow personal-story pacing. The mouth movement remains visible and synchronized as ID_A turns slightly toward the window side of the room while continuing to talk. At normal speed, ID_A turns slightly to the side and glances toward the curtain as if the room itself has triggered the reflection. The spoken line remains clearly mouth-synced, including subtle lip compression at clause endings. In a soft, thoughtful female voice, ID_A says, \"Maybe it is because I have been too busy to really look at any of this for a while.\" The visual style remains realistic and soft, with warm-neutral indoor tones and a personal diary-video mood. The emotional atmosphere is quiet and self-aware. A slight pan follows ID_A as the subject turns toward the curtain, keeping facial expression and mouth articulation visible while revealing more of the side wall. The curtain, a faint edge of the window area, and small warm decorative lights remain visible. The room continues to feel intimate and uncluttered. Light fabric movement, a soft shift of feet, and low indoor ambience are audible. No background music. The room’s quiet and the speaker’s voice dominate.",/n
